$schema-note: Brief 086 Phase 2 — CC-Direct-WebSearch override table for the Hardcover rating backfill (Stage 6). Each overrides[] entry maps an SSOT externalBookId to a verbatim Hardcover title (+ optional author form) that produces a numeric-rating hit under the adapter's exact `title _eq` + contributor-substring-author match (src/lib/ingestion/v2/sources/hardcover.ts). Every override was verified read-only against the live Hardcover GraphQL API along the exact Phase-3 resolution path before commit (the `_eq` query returns the rated book as the first author-matching hit). skipped[] documents every Phase-1 benign miss that is NOT resolvable via a title-_eq override, with the reason. Counts-invariant: overrides[].length + skipped[].length === phase1BenignMissCount.

overrides.note: Omnibus (Xenos/Malleus/Hereticus/The Magos). Bare 'Eisenhorn' _eq picks an unrated edition first; the full omnibus title resolves to the rated record (4.28).
Hardcover stores the subtitle merged into the title field; bare 'The Vincula Insurgency' _eq returns zero. rating 4.00.
Founding omnibus (First and Only / Ghostmaker / Necropolis). Hardcover titles it 'The Founding'; _eq returns Abnett's omnibus as first author-match (4.55).
Bare 'The Saint' _eq returns only non-Abnett books; the 'Gaunt's Ghosts: The Saint' title resolves to Abnett (4.13).
Bare 'The Lost' _eq returns the Abnett edition as the first author-matching hit among 5 (4.31).

overrides.rosterTitle: Gaunt's Ghosts: The Victory Omnibus Part One, 12-13
overrides.note: Bare 'The Victory' _eq returns the Abnett edition as the first author-matching hit (3.50). Distinct 'The Victory: Part Two' edition exists; this slug is Part One.
Roster title has a spurious 'the' ('Warriors of the Ultramar'); Hardcover title is 'Warriors of Ultramar' (2.75).
Title matched in Phase 1 but Hardcover stores author as 'Rob   Sanders' (triple space), so the single-spaced roster author failed the substring match. Last-name author override fixes it (2.00).

overrides.rosterTitle: Warlord: Fury of the God Machine
overrides.note: Roster 'God Machine'; Hardcover hyphenates 'God-Machine' (4.00).
Title matched but Hardcover stores 'Mike  Lee' (double space); last-name author override fixes the substring match (3.50).
Bare 'Celestine' is a different (French) novel; the full title 'Celestine: The Living Saint' resolves to Andy Clark's W40K novella (4.50).
Bare title returns Todd Herzman's 'Honourbound' first (no match), then 'Rachel  Harrison' (double space). Last-name override skips the non-W40K hit and selects the rated W40K edition (4.00).
Hardcover stores 'Rachel  Harrison' (double space); last-name author override fixes the match (3.80).
Hardcover title carries a trailing apostrophe ("Brutal Kunnin'") absent from the roster (4.22).
Title matched but Hardcover stores 'Robert  Rath' (double space); last-name author override fixes the match (4.12).
Title matched but Hardcover stores 'Marc  Collins' (double space); last-name author override fixes the match (3.00).

overrides.rosterTitle: The Lion: Sons of the Forest
overrides.hardcoverTitle: The Lion: Son of the Forest
overrides.note: Roster has 'Sons' (plural); the canonical title is 'Son' (singular) (4.27).
Roster lacks the leading 'The'; Hardcover also stores 'Robert  Rath' (double space), so both title and author needed correction (4.00).
Watson's 1990 W40K original (later revised as 'Draco'); Hardcover title is bare 'Inquisitor'. _eq returns the Watson edition (inquisitor-1990) as the first author-matching hit among 5 (3.10).
Medium confidence. Hardcover credits the W40K Space Wolf novel to 'William King' rather than the roster's 'Lee Lightner' pen-name; author override matches the rated edition (3.00).

skipped.reason: rated edition exists (ravenor-2004, 3.89) but an unrated same-author duplicate (ravenor-21bbd13d...) sorts first under title _eq; Stage 6 picks the first author-match → no rating. Needs slug/ID lookup (future brief).
not on Hardcover (title _eq returns zero books); the Ravenor series page lists only Ravenor, Ravenor Rogue, and the omnibus.
